title: Risers Gemstone Texture Pack
description: This texture only support with the plugin !
body:
# 💎 Risers Gemstone – The Core of Power and Prestige

Introducing **Risers Gemstone** — a special token that symbolizes **true strength, loyalty, and status** within the **RISERS** community.

---

## ✨ What Makes It Special?

- **🔹 Rare & Valuable**  
  Not just a collectible, but a true mark of honor.

- **🔹 Power-Linked**  
  May grant access to exclusive features, boosts, or trades  
  *(server-specific & fully configurable).*

- **🔹 Visually Stunning**  
  Crafted with a custom model and subtle glow that stands out in any inventory.

- **🔹 Tradable & Showcaseable**  
  A perfect flex item for elite RISERS members.

---

## 📦 Dependencies

This project **requires** the following:

- **CIT Resewn**  
  https://modrinth.com/project/j0hnqF0l

- **Fabric API / Required Loader**  
  https://modrinth.com/project/otVJckYQ

---

Whether you earn it, trade it, or treasure it —  
**Risers Gemstone** is more than an item.

It’s a legacy.  
**Will you be worthy enough to hold one?**
